title: GraphQL Example for Postman
excerpt: Hi I am having trouble getting postman to communicate with Monday.com API.  Can anyone post a very basic example query that I can run to see where I am going wrong?  Very much appreciated

posts.author: imo (Ian Morris)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I am having trouble getting postman to communicate with Monday.com API. Can anyone post a very basic example query that I can run to see where I am going wrong? Very much appreciated

posts.author: imo (Ian Morris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you so much. From your example I realised what I have been typing incorrectly

I hadn’t included the https:// in the path above. I had the query string correct, but it was returning “no query string present” so kept on focusing on this. I hadn’t thought to look above for the issue

Really appreciated and thanks I will check out the GraphQl example you just posted also
